alkylation reagent: Cysteines were alkylated by 50 mM iodoacetamide.
cleavage agent: digested with sequencing-grade trypsin (Promega) at 37 °C overnight.
fragmentation method: analyzed using a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer with HCD fragmentation.
instrument: analyzed using a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer.
reduction reagent: Proteins were disulphide-reduced by 25 mM DTT at 37 °C for 40 min.
